label: Transparent Larch motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Larch transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated larch needles motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A compact botanical cluster of soft golden autumn larch needles arranged in radial tufts on a short bark-grey twig, with a few tiny moss-green lichen patches on the bark and muted alpine forest neutral shadows. Accurate larch needle form: many fine flexible needles, warm gold and ochre tips, subtle darker amber bases, rough grey-brown bark texture, natural botanical detail.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the whole needle cluster and short twig without cropping; clean readable silhouette suitable for background removal.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves gold larch needles, bark grey, moss green lichen, and fine needle texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no pine cones, no flowers, no second plant species except tiny moss/lichen on the same twig, no green-screen color in the subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Larch" / "Larch", derived from the transparent larch needle motif currently visible: golden autumn larch needle tufts, bark-grey twig texture, moss-green lichen patches, and alpine forest neutrals.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the larch motif. The board must visibly respect only motif-derived colors: gold larch needles, ochre amber needle bases, bark grey, deep bark charcoal, moss green lichen, pale alpine fog neutrals, and restrained seasonal monitoring accents.
Canvas: exact 16:9 landscape board, 3840 x 2160 high-resolution source asset. Use a precise product UI grid with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Larch", motif story, palette swatches, type scale, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated asset examples.
UI language: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style seasonal monitoring system for alpine forest operations. Use 8px card radius, crisp thin bark-grey borders, larch-needle divider rules, alpine-fog surfaces, gold primary actions, moss-green healthy status, amber seasonal warnings, bark-charcoal text, and compact operational navigation.
Specific components: buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, breadcrumb/sidebar/top nav, search command palette, monitoring data table, sensor row, metric dashboard, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error/success states, token chips.
Typography: include English labels and Japanese examples such as "季節監視", "検索", "状態", "針葉", "見出し" with clean multilingual product UI guidance.
Texture: subtle fine larch-needle striation pattern, bark crackle grain, and moss speckle texture, low contrast and tactile.
Text constraints: short readable UI labels only, no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no dark mode, no neon, no random brand names, no misspellings, no watermark, no animals, no flowers, no cones as the main motif.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Larch" / "Larch", translated from the visible light board and the same transparent larch needle motif. It must feel like the same seasonal monitoring system adapted for dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Preserve motif-derived palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, typography, 8px radius, larch-needle dividers, bark-grey surfaces, gold needle primary actions, moss-green healthy status, amber seasonal warnings, and alpine forest neutrals from the Larch motif and light board.
Canvas: exact 16:9 landscape board, 3840 x 2160 high-resolution source asset. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Larch", Dark Mode, motif story, palette swatches, type scale, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated asset examples.
Dark visual system: deep bark charcoal and alpine-night background derived from the twig shadows, warm fog text from alpine neutrals, dark bark cards, muted bark-grey borders, gold larch needle active states, ochre and honey chart data, moss-green success states, lichen green secondary states, rusty amber alert states, subtle larch needle striation texture and bark crackle grain.
Specific components: buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, breadcrumb/sidebar/top nav, search command palette, monitoring data table, sensor row, metric dashboard, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error/success states, token chips.
Typography: include English labels and Japanese examples such as "季節監視", "検索", "状態", "針葉", "見出し" with clean multilingual product UI guidance.
Text constraints: short readable UI labels only, no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no misspellings, no watermark, no animals, no flowers, no cones as the main motif.
